# chore(kaizen): bump 2.7.5 → 2.8.0 + add [interpretability] extra

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `ed989c7330ed` — chore(kaizen): bump 2.7.5 → 2.8.0 + add [interpretability] extra

**Body**:

Version bump consistency per rules/zero-tolerance.md Rule 5 (all
version locations updated atomically):

- packages/kailash-kaizen/pyproject.toml: version = "2.8.0"
- packages/kailash-kaizen/src/kaizen/__init__.py: __version__ = "2.8.0"

New [interpretability] extra declaration:

    interpretability = [
        "transformers>=4.40,<5.0",
        "sae-lens>=3.0",
    ]

transformers is the anchor for AutoModelForCausalLM + AutoTokenizer
used by the logit-lens / attention / probe paths. sae-lens is the
anchor for pre-trained Gemma-Scope SAE loading in sae_features().
Plotly + matplotlib are transitively available in the broader ML
stack so they're NOT pinned separately — _require_plotly() /
_require_matplotlib() raise the same [interpretability] install
guidance if they turn out to be absent on a minimal install.

CHANGELOG [2.8.0] entry under Added + Security:
- kaizen.interpretability.InterpretabilityDiagnostics adapter (#567 PR#4 of 7)
- Cross-SDK Diagnostic Protocol conformance
- kaizen.interpretability facade module for orphan-detection §1 compliance
- specs/kaizen-interpretability.md new spec file
- Security posture: local_files_only=True default, no hardcoded HF token,
  API-only refusal, no raw prompt text in logs

Refs #567 (PR#4 of 7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
